# Sayerli

> Sayerli is a SaaS platform built for Moroccan SMEs (PMEs). It centralizes client management, quotes (devis), invoices (factures), and payments in one simple tool — in French, in MAD (Moroccan dirhams), with Arabic RTL support.

Sayerli solves a real problem: small Moroccan businesses have no dedicated tool to manage their commercial activity. Most still use Excel or paper. Sayerli replaces that with a modern, cloud-based platform designed specifically for the Moroccan market.

**Tagline:** "Nta khdem, Sayerli ysayyer lik lba9i" — You work, Sayerli handles the rest.

## What Sayerli Does

- **CRM** — Manage clients, contact info, and commercial history
- **Devis (Quotes)** — Create and send professional quotes; clients can accept or reject via a public portal
- **Factures (Invoices)** — Create, send, and track invoices with payment status; clients can view invoices online
- **Paiements (Payments)** — Track payments and outstanding balances
- **Déclarations** — Clients can declare payments; owners approve or reject
- **Équipe (Team)** — Invite team members with roles (admin, manager, commercial, comptable)
- **Notifications** — Real-time alerts and email notifications per event type
- **Tableau de bord (Dashboard)** — Analytics and business overview with charts
- **Settings** — Company profile, branding, banking info (RIB, IBAN, SWIFT), language, theme

## Who It's For

- Moroccan small and medium businesses (PMEs/TPEs)
- Freelancers and auto-entrepreneurs in Morocco
- Agencies, consultants, and service businesses based in Morocco
- Any Moroccan business that needs to manage clients, quotes, and invoices

## Key Differentiators

- Built specifically for Morocco (not adapted from a Western product)
- Currency: MAD (Moroccan dirham) natively
- Languages: French (primary), English, Arabic with RTL support
- Moroccan legal compliance for quotes and invoices
- Simple, fast, no accountant required

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 15, TailwindCSS, TypeScript — hosted on Vercel
- Backend: NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM — hosted on Railway
- Auth: JWT, multi-tenant (each company's data is isolated)
- Email: Resend (domain: sayerli.com)

- Homepage: https://sayerli.com

- Login: https://sayerli.com/login
